name: codex-guard-notify
description: Session-scoped completion guards and Lark/Feishu notifications for Codex hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Guard long Codex tasks and notify on success.
interface.longDescription: Adds session-local completion guards for Codex via hooks, with structured success matching, auto-continue before stop, and optional Lark/Feishu final notifications.
defaultPrompt: Install Codex guard hooks into my local Codex config.
Set up final-only Lark notifications for guarded sessions.
Show me how to use >guard set for a long-running task.
